preamble: The palatalization of the alveolar lateral [l] to the palatal lateral [ʎ] often occurs in the context of following high front vowels or glides. This was a significant stage in the development of Italian and Spanish.
sources: Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
